# Belay Reports

> Professional digital inspection platform for aerial adventure programs — secure, offline-capable field inspection reports for rope courses, zip lines, and challenge courses.

Belay Reports is an ACCT-accredited digital inspection platform used by professional inspectors to document rope course, zip line, and aerial adventure equipment inspections, training sessions, and daily operational assessments. The app is offline-first and installs as a Progressive Web App on iOS, Android, and desktop.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the Belay Reports inspection platform.
- [Welcome](/welcome): Marketing landing page introducing professional rope course inspections.
- [Capabilities](/capabilities): Device and browser capability detection for the PWA.
- [Install](/install): How to install Belay Reports as a Progressive Web App on iOS, Android, and desktop.
